title: Theme Management Flow
description: Theme initialization, application, get, reload from storage, save, and reset cycle

activities.name: _init
steps: Set state = default_values {sat, hue, lig, alpha, light_text}
[Branch] If read succeeds AND data is Blob/object → data = await data.text()
[Branch] If data is non-empty string → JSON.parse(data)
[Branch] If parsed.colors exists → merge data.colors into state → call reload_()
[Branch] If JSON.parse fails → show UIAlert(title='Error loading theme data', message=parse error)
[Branch] If read fails AND error.code !== 'subject_does_not_exist' → console.error (no alert shown)

activities.name: apply(values)
activities.trigger: External caller sets new theme values
steps: Call reload_() → apply CSS vars to DOM + broadcast change
Call save_() → debounce persist to filesystem

activities.name: get(key)
activities.trigger: External caller reads a single theme value

activities.name: reload_()
activities.trigger: Called after state mutation (apply, reset, or _init data load)
steps: Call broadcastService.sendBroadcast('themeChanged', { palette: {primaryHue, primarySaturation, primaryLightness, primaryAlpha, primaryColor} }, { sendToNewAppInstances: true })

activities.name: commit_save_()
activities.trigger: Fired by save_() debounce timer after 1000ms
steps: Call puter.fs.write(PUTER_THEME_DATA_FILENAME, JSON.stringify({ colors: this.state }, undefined, 5))

activities.name: reset()
steps: Call reload_() → re-apply default CSS vars + broadcast

activity_flow_summary: _init → set defaults → read FS (async) → [data found] → parse JSON → merge state → reload_ → END _init
apply(values) → merge state → reload_ → save_ → [cooldown active] → clearTimeout → setTimeout(1s) → commit_save_ → puter.fs.write
key_relationships: ThemeService depends_on BroadcastService (private field #broadcastService, resolved via globalThis.services.get)
ThemeService depends_on UIAlert (for parse error display)
ThemeService mutates DOM :root CSS custom properties (7 variables)
important_notes: Theme is persisted as JSON { colors: { sat, hue, lig, alpha, light_text } } in '~/.__puter_gui.json'. Persistence is debounced (1s cooldown). reset() deletes the file rather than writing defaults. _init load is fully async/non-blocking. Broadcast 'themeChanged' is sent to all windows including new app instances.
